steps.title: Confirm the first claim
steps.content: The first sentence says the installation creates a whimsical yet perplexing experience. The next sentence describes visitors being dazzled and confused inside a blue room with a stuffed unicorn, confirming that same claim with specifics.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals a second item in a list, but no list is being built. Choice B signals replacement or contrast. Choice D also signals contrast. The needed transition reinforces the first sentence. The answer is C.
